Claude's Full Response to User:
查清楚了。結論先講：**功能上不需要改，目前是正常運作的；要不要改是「架構取捨」而非「修 bug」。**

## 現況事實

| 項目 | 內容 |
|------|------|
| 舊型別（1代） | `IEnergyLevelUpgradeInfo { Upgrade, EnergyLevel }` — 新 protocol 已移除，現在是 `MagicPotController.ts:7` / `SlotReels.ts:9` 的**本地 stub** |
| 新 protocol | `IScAccuUpgradeInfo { Upgrade, Stage, Count }`（`ar2es2Proto.d.ts:570`）|
| 串接點 | `SlotReels.ts:2210` 做轉接：`{ Upgrade: scAccuUpgrade.Upgrade, EnergyLevel: scAccuUpgrade.Stage }` |

也就是說：**`EnergyLevel` 就是 proto 的 `Stage`**，stub 等於新型別的「改名子集」（少了 `Count`）。整條鏈靠 `SlotReels.ts:2210` 這個 adapter 接得起來，沒有壞掉。

## 要不要改 —— 兩條路的取捨

**A. 維持現狀（stub + adapter）** ← 我傾向這個
- stub 實際上是一層 **anti-corruption layer**：MagicPot 模組不直接依賴 proto，命名用領域語意 `EnergyLevel`（比 `Stage` 更貼魔法罐「能量等級」概念）。
- 代價：多一個跟 proto 平行的型別，未來 proto 改欄位時 stub 可能漂移；新人讀 `MagicPotController` 不會知道 `EnergyLevel` 對應 `ScAccuUpgrade.Stage`。

**B. 直接改用 proto 的 `IScAccuUpgradeInfo`**
- 好處：單一事實來源，刪掉 stub + 刪掉 `SlotReels.ts:2210` 的手動映射。
- 代價：MagicPotController 兩個事件介面（`PLAY_COLLECT_EFFECT` / `PLAY_UPGRADE_EFFECT`）與內部全改吃 `Stage`，要動 `MagicPotController.ts` + `SlotReels.ts` + `ScatterShowState.ts` 註解；領域語意名 `EnergyLevel` 換成較模糊的 `Stage`；多帶一個用不到的 `Count`。

## 建議

**沒有急迫性，不必現在改。** 觸發改 B 的條件有兩個，命中再動：
1. 魔法罐之後需要用到 `Count`（目前只用 `Upgrade` + `Stage`，用不到）；
2. 你們團隊規範要求「不得自建跟 proto 平行的型別」。

如果決定保留 A，唯一值得做的小事是**在 stub 註解補一行對應關係**（`EnergyLevel ≡ proto.ScAccuUpgrade.Stage`），降低未來踩雷。要我加這行註解嗎？還是你想直接走 B 我幫你改？

Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings; ultra: deep multi-agent review in the cloud). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled cloud agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring cloud agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).

- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). onLoad()\\n    {\\n        this.RegisterEvent();\\n        this.RegisterTestKeyCodes();\\n\\n        if (!this.IsValid(this.m_magicPot, 'm_magicPot')) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        this.m_magicPotSpine = this.m_magicPot.getComponent(sp.Skeleton);\\n        if (!this.IsValid(this.m_magicPotSpine, 'm_magicPotSpine')) {\\n            log('[MagicPotController] Failed to get Skeleton /**\\n     * @ch 事件\\n     * @param event 事件\\n     * @param args 參數\\n     */\\n    OnEvent( event: string, ...args: any[] )\\n    {\\n        switch (event) {\\n            /**@ch 初始化*/\\n         case Game_Define.EVENT.DEVICE_ROTATION:\\n                this.OnDeviceRotation();\\n                break;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 驗證初始化參數\\n     * @param args 參數陣列\\n     * @returns 是否為有效參數\\n     */\\n    private ValidateInitParams(args: any[]): args is [GameView, number] {\\n        return args.length >= 2 &&\\n            args[0] != null && // GameView 物件\\n      this.PlayMagicPotAnimations(MAGIC_POT_ANIMATION.FG_IDLE);\\n        } else {\\n            this.PlayLevelAnimations(this.m_level);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 初始化\\n     * @param gameView 遊戲視窗\\n     * @param level 等級\\n     */\\n    Init(gameView: GameView, level: number) {\\n        this.m_gameView = gameView;\\n        this.SetLevel(level);\\n        this.m_isInit =  * @param isPlayAnimation 是否播放動畫\\n     */\\n    private SetClientLevelInternal(clientLevel: number, isPlayAnimation: boolean = true) {\\n        this.m_level = clientLevel;\\n\\n        if === 0) {\\n                log(\\\"PlayCollectEffect 失敗: 資料為空\\\");\\n                return;\\n            }\\n\\n            // 停止所有進行中的動畫\\n            this.StopAllAnimations();\\n\\n            const isPlaySequentially = platePositions.length < Game_Define.MAX_SCATTER;\\n            let isPlayUpgradeEffectFinish = !data || data.length === 0;\\n\\n            // 判斷是否有升級資料並決定插入位置（隨機）\\n @param callback 回調\\n     * @param context 呼叫來源（用於 log）\\n     */\\n    private InvokeSafeCallback(callback?: () => void, context: string = \\\"\\\"): void {\\n        if (!callback) return;\\n /**\\n     * @ch 播放升級效果\\n     * @param data 資料\\n     * @param callback 完成回調\\n     */\\n    private async PlayUpgradeEffect(data: IEnergyLevelUpgradeInfo, callback?: () => void): Promise<void> {\\n                 await this.PlayMagicPotAnimations(upgradeAnimConfigs);\\n                } else {\\n                    const upgradeAnimConfigs = MAGIC_POT_ANIMATION.UPGRADE_TO_NEXT(oldLevel, this.InvokeSafeCallback(callback, \\\"PlayUpgradeEffect\\\");\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 停止所有動畫並清理資源\\n     */\\n    private StopAllAnimations(): void {\\n        // 停止所有 Tween\\n const isPlaySequentially = platePositions.length < Game_Define.MAX_SCATTER;\\n            let isPlayUpgradeEffectFinish = !data || data.length === 0;\\n\\n            // 判斷是否有升級資料並決定插入位置（隨機）\\n AudioManager.Play(AudioManager.AudioClips.FlyToMagicPot);\\n\\n                    // 等待所有動畫完成\\n                    await Promise.all(promises);\\n\\n                    // 播放收集動畫組合：Idle + Hit + LV?\\n                    const collectAnimConfigs = MAGIC_POT_ANIMATION.COLLECT_EFFECT(this.m_level);\\n                    this.PlayMagicPotAnimations(collectAnimConfigs);\\n                    // 播放收集音效（suppressCollectSfx=true 時靜音）\\n                    if (!suppressCollectSfx) {\\n                        AudioManager.Play(AudioManager.AudioClips.MagicPotCollect);\\n                    }\\n   <type>change</type>
  <title>Added protocol mapping documentation to IEnergyLevelUpgradeInfo stub</title>

    <fact>Upgrade field maps to ScAccuUpgrade.Upgrade in ar2es2Proto.IScAccuUpgradeInfo protocol</fact>

The comment also notes the adapter location (SlotReels.ts) and that the Count field from the protocol is unused. This documentation preserves the architectural decision to maintain a domain-specific interface while making the protocol mapping explicit for future developers.</narrative>

= symbolId === Game_Define.Symbol.Collect\\n                           || symbolId === Game_Define.Symbol.CollectAndRetrigger;\\n            cell.SetSymbolDark(!isCollect);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 重置螢幕放大效果\\n     * @param callback ZoomOut 動畫結束後的回調（有震動時等動畫結束才呼叫，無震動時立即呼叫）\\n     * @param isAllStop 是否全部停輪完成\\n     */\\n    private ResetCameraEffect(callback?: () => void, this.StopShakeEffect(callback, isAllStop);\\n            this.m_isShaking = false;\\n        } else {\\n            callback?.();\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 清理所有聽牌特效\\n     */\\n    private ClearAllTeaseEffects(): void {\\n        for (let col = 0; col < this.m_teaseEffectsActive.length; col++) {\\n            if (this.m_teaseEffectsActive[col]) {\\n                // log(`TODO: this.m_teaseEffectsActive[col] = false;\\n            this.m_teaseEffectNodes[col] = null;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 計算聽牌額外轉輪圈數\\n     * @param col 列索引\\n     * @param startCol (this.CheckTeaseConditionsForCol(col)) {\\n            // 🆕 特殊處理：FreeGame 聽牌時的最後一輪\\n            if (this.m_gameView.RoundInfo.NearMissKind === NearMissKind.FreeGame && \\n                col ===
